description: Green wallet with press button tab closure and all-over stich detailing  Metal brand badge on the tab on the front Once opened, central flap has a zippered compartment, six card holders and one slip pocket on one side with press button that can be attached to centre flap; eight card holders, one id card holder and two slip pockets on the other side Quality Assurance In case of any manufacturing defects exchange the wallet within two weeks from the date of purchase
